auth.title: Log in / Register
format.SINGLE_ELIMINATION_desc: Lose once and you're out. Classic bracket.
format.DOUBLE_ELIMINATION_desc: Two losses to be eliminated. Lower bracket gives a second chance.
format.ROUND_ROBIN_desc: Everyone plays everyone. Winner by total points.
format.SWISS_desc: N rounds, each round pairs players of similar strength. No rematches.
format.MIXED_desc: Group stage, then playoff from the top of each group.
tournament.title: Tournaments
tournament.copyTooltip: Create a copy of this tournament (no participants, results, or dates)
create.title: Create tournament
create.loginRequired: Log in to create a tournament
create.onlyOrganizerResultsHint: If off, participants can enter match scores themselves
create.registrationStartHint: If no date is set, registration will open immediately
match.finalResultPlayerHint: Match will finish when the other player also marks the same score as final
organizer.title: Organizer panel: {{name}}
organizer.minParticipants: At least 2 participants required to start
organizer.launchDesc: Registration will close and matches will be generated automatically for the "{{format}}" format. This action is irreversible.
organizer.noMatches: Matches will appear after the tournament starts
organizer.openRegistrationDesc: Allow participants to sign up for the tournament. You can still edit tournament settings.
organizer.bracketOnTournamentPage: Tournament started. View the bracket on the tournament page.
profile.loginRequired: Log in to view your profile
profile.title: My profile
admin.title: Administration
guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Tournirken — tournament management platform
guide.overview.title: System overview
guide.overview.desc: Tournirken is a platform for creating and running competitive tournaments. Multiple bracket formats are supported, including automatic player advancement, groups, and playoffs.
guide.overview.screenshotCaption: Home page: tournament list with filters on the left
guide.register.title: Registration & login
guide.register.desc: An account is required to join or create tournaments. The login/register form is located on the home page in the left sidebar.
guide.register.screenshotCaption: Left sidebar on the home page — login/register form (for unauthenticated users)
guide.register.step2: Enter a username (letters, digits and _ only), email, and password (at least 6 characters)
guide.register.step3: Click Register — you will be logged in automatically
guide.browse.title: Finding & browsing tournaments
guide.browse.desc: The home page shows a list of all tournaments with search and filter options.
guide.browse.filterStatus: Status — filter by status: Registration, Active, Finished, Draft
guide.create.title: Creating a tournament
guide.create.desc: Any logged-in user can create a tournament. Navigate to Create tournament in the menu.
guide.create.screenshotBottomCaption: Additional settings: registration dates, logo, format
guide.create.opt5: Only organizer sets results — restricts who can change the score
guide.manage.title: Managing a tournament
guide.manage.desc: After creating a tournament, the organizer gains access to the management panel.
guide.manage.screenshotCaption: Organizer panel: participant management, bracket, and status controls
guide.manage.step1: — moves the tournament to 'Registration' status. Participants can sign up.
guide.manage.step2: — assign seeds/groups to participants, choose matchup order.
guide.manage.step4: — winners automatically advance to the next round.
guide.formats.title: Tournament formats
guide.formats.seDesc: Lose once and you're out. Every match is decisive. Fast format — ideal for large participant counts. The finalist winner takes 1st place.
guide.formats.deDesc: Every participant gets a second chance through the Lower Bracket. The final is between the winners of the Upper and Lower brackets.
guide.formats.rrDesc: Everyone plays everyone. The winner is determined by total wins. Best for small groups (up to ~16 participants).
guide.formats.swDesc: Participants with similar scores face each other each round. You must specify the number of rounds (usually ≈ log₂(N) + 1). Final standings are by points and Buchholz coefficient.
guide.formats.mixDesc: Group stage first (Round Robin within each group), then top finishers from each group advance to a Single Elimination playoff. Set the number of groups and how many advance from each.
guide.formats.screenshotCaption: Tournament bracket — automatically generated after the tournament starts
guide.results.title: Entering results
guide.results.desc: Match results can be entered by participants or only by the organizer — depending on tournament settings.
guide.results.rule1: If only the organizer sets results — the organizer enters the score and confirms it immediately (Final flag)
guide.results.rule2: If participants can enter results — both players must submit the same final score. When scores match, the match finishes automatically.
guide.results.rule3: Playoff matches cannot end in a draw
guide.results.auto: After a match finishes, the winner automatically advances to the next round. In Swiss format, the next round is generated when all matches in the current round are complete.
guide.profile.title: Profile & statistics
guide.profile.screenshotCaption: User profile: tournament statistics, email and password change
guide.profile.desc: The profile shows participation statistics: number of tournaments, wins, second places, and organized events. You can also change your email and password.
format.CUSTOM_desc: Build the tournament bracket manually using a visual drag-and-drop builder.
custom.handlesDesc: Green handle = winner, red = loser. Drag from a handle to an input slot on another node.
custom.viewOnlyBanner: View only — read-only mode. Tournament is active.
